phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest tram stop is
phrases.text_local: Où est l'arrêt de tram le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh lah-RAY duh TRAM luh ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: The Nice tramway runs through Place Masséna. The Masséna stop is centrally located and connects to the airport and train station.

responses.english: The Masséna stop is right there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tram stop is on the square
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'arrêt du tramway sur la place Masséna ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo seh TROOV lah-RAY doo tram-WAY soor lah PLAS mah-SAY-nah
phrases.cultural_note: Place Masséna is a major tram hub — both Lines 1 and 2 stop here, making it the best transfer point in Nice.

responses.english: The stop is in the centre of the square.
responses.phonetic: lah-RAY eh toh SAHN-truh duh lah PLAHSS
responses.french: L'arrêt est au centre de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are public toilets nearby
phrases.text_local: Il y a des toilettes publiques à proximité ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah day twah-LET poob-LEEK ah prok-see-mee-TAY
phrases.cultural_note: Public toilets in Nice are often located near major squares and parks.

responses.english: Yes, on the other side of the square.
responses.phonetic: wee duh LOH-truh koh-TAY duh lah PLAHSS
responses.french: Oui, de l'autre côté de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if this is where the Carnival parade takes place
phrases.text_local: Est-ce ici que se déroulent les défilés du Carnaval de Nice ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-SEE-see keh seh day-ROOL lay day-fee-LAY doo kar-nah-VAL deh NEES
phrases.cultural_note: Nice Carnival is one of the world's biggest, held every February. Place Masséna is the centrepiece of the parades.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for directions to the Promenade des Anglais on foot
phrases.text_local: Quel est le chemin à pied pour rejoindre la Promenade des Anglais ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh leh sheh-MAN ah PYAY poor reh-ZHWAN-dreh lah pro-meh-NAHD day zon-GLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Place Masséna is just two minutes' walk from the seafront — head south through the Jardin Albert 1er.

responses.english: Straight south, five minutes on foot.
responses.phonetic: too DRWAH vair luh SOOD SAHNK mee-NOOT ah PYAY
responses.french: Tout droit vers le sud, cinq minutes à pied.
